function DumiMarkdownInner() {

  return <><div className="markdown"><p>{$$contentTexts[0].value}</p><h2 id="说明"><a aria-hidden="true" tabIndex="-1" href="#说明"><span className="icon icon-link" /></a>{"说明"}</h2><SourceCode lang="bash">{$$contentTexts[1].value}</SourceCode><ol start="2"><li><strong>{$$contentTexts[2].value}</strong></li></ol><SourceCode lang="jsx">{$$contentTexts[3].value}</SourceCode><p><strong>{$$contentTexts[4].value}</strong></p><ul><li>{$$contentTexts[5].value}<a href="https://codesandbox.io/s/f-react-forked-lcrxqf">{$$contentTexts[6].value}</a></li><li><a href="https://github.com/antvis/FEngine/tree/master/packages/f-react/examples">{$$contentTexts[7].value}</a></li></ul></div></>;
}

// export named function for fastRefresh
// ref: https://github.com/pmmmwh/react-refresh-webpack-plugin/blob/main/docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md#edits-always-lead-to-full-reload
function DumiMarkdownContent() {
  // wrap suspense for catch async meta data
  return <DumiPage><Suspense fallback={<LoadingComponent />}><DumiMarkdownInner /></Suspense></DumiPage>;
}

export default DumiMarkdownContent;
